name: Mrwhosetheboss
oneLine: British smartphone reviewer known for energetic, narrative-driven phone comparisons and elaborate phone-tower sets.
bio: Arun Maini is a British YouTuber of Indian descent and Economics graduate who runs Mrwhosetheboss, a tech review channel that began as anonymous voice-over smartphone videos and shifted in 2016 to on-camera, high-energy reviews. By November 2025 the channel had surpassed 21.8 million subscribers and over 7.8 billion views. He gained additional press attention in 2026 after being detained, strip-searched, and deported at the US border.
topics: Chinese OEM phone reviews (Xiaomi, Honor, Realme)
style: high-energy on-camera reviews with elaborate scripted set pieces and signature phone-stack visuals
